title: Lactate not just waste
script_summary: Lactate is a misunderstood molecule with vital roles beyond being mere waste.

segments.voiceover: Lactate isn’t just waste; it’s a key player in our bodies.
For years, scientists viewed lactate as a byproduct of exercise. But new research is challenging that idea.
Lactate actually fuels our muscles and brain, helping us adapt and recover.
Studies show that lactate can improve endurance and even enhance cognitive function. It’s not just a waste product!
So next time you hear ‘lactic acid’, remember it’s more of a fuel than a waste.
Curious about more science myths? Follow for more insights!
